problem:
Phase 1 completed schema migration (DeckLibrary abstraction + FriendshipInvitation model).

Now need to:
1. Audit codebase for all BarDeck.instanceId queries (will break after migration)
2. Design query pattern updates to use library.instanceId relation
3. Identify files requiring changes
4. Validate Scene Atlas functionality won't regress
5. Plan seed script structure for friendship decks (52 + 64 cards)

Critical: Existing Scene Atlas must remain fully functional after changes.
